response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: University(universityOfEdinburgh)  
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: Exists x (University(x))  
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: (University(universityOfEdinburgh) & LocatedIn(universityOfEdinburgh, unitedKingdom) & LocatedIn(universityOfEdinburgh, scotland))  
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: LocatedIn(unitedKingdom, universityOfEdinburgh)
